query: SELECT id, name, email, phone, role FROM user WHERE role IN ('super_admin', 'admin', 'comercial', 'designer', 'jefe_taller', 'operario') ORDER BY FIELD(role, 'super_admin', 'admin', 'comercial', 'designer', 'jefe_taller', 'operario'), name;
